nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_hummock_test crate providing Hummock storage integration tests and replay tools.

nodes.name: main.rs
nodes.summary: Entry point for the Hummock trace replay tool that reconstructs a Hummock storage instance from recorded operation traces for debugging and testing.

nodes.name: replay_impl.rs
nodes.summary: Hummock trace replay implementation that executes recorded get/scan/ingest operations against a reconstructed storage instance.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_hummock_trace crate implementing operation tracing and recording for the Hummock storage engine.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for Hummock trace replay tool explaining how to capture, record, and replay storage operations for debugging performance issues.

nodes.name: bench_state_table.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark for streaming state table operations measuring read/write throughput for the stateful operator state backend.

nodes.name: stream_hash_agg.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark for streaming hash aggregation operator measuring throughput under varying cardinalities and group-by key distributions.

nodes.name: stream_hash_join_mem.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark for streaming hash join operator measuring memory usage and throughput under various join selectivities.

nodes.name: stream_hash_join_rt.rs
nodes.summary: Real-time streaming hash join benchmark measuring end-to-end latency for join operations on streaming input.

nodes.name: stream_hash_join.py
nodes.summary: Python script generating workload parameters and running the streaming hash join benchmark with configurable input sizes.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the streaming spill test crate testing disk spilling behavior for memory-constrained streaming operators.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Library root for the streaming spill test crate, re-exporting test utilities for memory spill scenarios.

nodes.name: test_mem_table.rs
nodes.summary: Tests for in-memory table spilling behavior ensuring data integrity when streaming operators exceed memory limits and spill to storage.

nodes.name: integration_test.toml
nodes.summary: TOML configuration for streaming integration test setup specifying test environment parameters.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_test_runner crate providing a custom test harness for async integration tests.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Library root for the test runner crate, re-exporting the custom async test runner infrastructure.

nodes.name: test_runner.rs
nodes.summary: Custom Tokio-based test runner that initializes the async runtime and provides structured test execution with configurable parallelism.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the compaction test crate providing end-to-end compaction correctness tests against a running cluster.

nodes.name: Makefile.toml
nodes.summary: cargo-make task definitions for running the compaction correctness test suite.

nodes.name: compaction.rs
nodes.summary: Entry point binary for the compaction correctness test runner, initializing logging and running the test suite.

nodes.name: compaction_test_runner.rs
nodes.summary: Core compaction test logic that generates SST data, runs compaction, and validates output correctness against expected key-value results.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Library root for the compaction test crate, re-exporting test runner utilities and client setup logic.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the e2e extended mode test crate validating PostgreSQL extended query protocol compatibility.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the e2e extended mode tests explaining how to run PostgreSQL extended query protocol compatibility tests against RisingWave.

nodes.name: main.rs
nodes.summary: Entry point for the PostgreSQL extended query protocol e2e test runner, executing parameterized query tests against a live RisingWave instance.

nodes.name: create_replay_hummock
nodes.summary: Constructs a fully-initialized HummockStorage instance from config and object store settings for trace replay, including cache, SST store, and meta client setup.
